_comment: REFRESHING (#748) -- placeholder push to trigger benchmark.yml on this PR so its own run supplies the new baseline numbers; stats below still hold the pre-refresh (2026-07-03, PR #655) values until that run's results are folded in. CI-RUNNER baseline for .github/workflows/benchmark.yml's relative regression check. This is NOT the 60fps/reference-hardware target from PLAN.md (a 2022 MacBook Air M2 24GB and the developer's PC) -- GitHub Actions runners are different, variable-speed hardware; see tools/benchmark/README.md. To refresh: run the workflow, read the mean_ms/p95_ms it reports (workflow log or the PR comment it posts), and update the stats block below with a new _comment noting the new source run.
